title: 大家慶祝何君堯無左個博士學位既同時 知唔知林奠其實係劍橋既榮譽院士

replies.msg:
大家望下劍橋大學wolfson college既網頁:
https://www.wolfson.cam.ac.uk/people/fellows/honorary-fellows
The Hon Carrie Yuet-ngor Lam GBM GBS!!!!

其實上年11月已經有班學校出公開信叫wolfson college收左佢個榮譽院士
https://www.varsity.co.uk/news/16647
https://www.hongkongfp.com/2018/11/24/students-urge-cambridge-college-retract-honorary-fellowship-awarded-hong-kong-chief-exec-carrie-lams/
不過好快俾學校個邊收左皮 佢地話
“In common with many Cambridge Colleges, Honorary Fellowships are awarded by the College’s Governing Body to people of distinction who have a close connection to the College. The decision to award Lam such a fellowship was taken by the Governing Body and there are no plans to revisit that decision.”

之後反送中運動爆發 四百幾個學生同職員出左封聯署信再叫wolfson college收左林奠個honorary fellow
不過學校拖撚左幾個月都無理到我地
依加見Lord Alton一寫信俾anglia ruskin何君堯就收左皮
希望各位twitter文宣隊員做野 上twitter推到英國班politician寫信去cambridge！

Carrie Lam is an honorary fellow of Wolfson College, Cambridge. Please send a letter to president of the College to ask for a retraction of Lam's fellowship as she does not deserve the merit.

https://twitter.com/lukedepulford/status/1188091907311898624
